bottom_line: Add macro-signature validation to template and browser-verification prompts to eliminate the 3-cycle browser fix loop and the S06 tab-navigation regression — both caused by missing `slug` parameters in `empty_state` macro calls.
coverage_notes: Analyzed all 19 step self-reports, all 6 fix-cycle prompts, S18 browser verification report, S15/S16 QV gate reports. No raw run logs available (worktree logs dir empty). DB telemetry used for step status confirmation. Fix-cycle prompts and agent self-reports used as primary evidence.

findings.title: Missing `slug` parameter in `empty_state` macro calls caused 3 successive S18 browser fix cycles
findings.recommendation: Add a macro-signature checklist to S05 (Template) and S18 (BrowserVerification) prompts: every `empty_state(...)` call must pass `slug` as the first positional arg. Add a fast 'macro call audit' step before browser verification to catch missing args before the slow E2E run.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00080/fix-cycles/F-00080_S18_FIX_cycle2_prompt.md:76 — empty_state macro called without slug arg
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add macro-signature validation to S05 and S18 prompts to catch missing `slug` params early; analyzed in F-00080 self-assess (ai-dev/work/F-00080/reports/F-00080_self_assess_report.md). Target files: prompts/F-00080_S05_template_prompt.md, prompts/F-00080_S18_BrowserVerification_prompt.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S05 template step broke tests.html tab navigation; caught only at S06 code review
findings.recommendation: Add a 'verify tab navigation + macro call signatures' self-review checklist to S05 before declaring done. Alternatively, add a fast smoke test that renders all 22 wired pages and asserts correct structure.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00080/fix-cycles/F-00080_S06_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md:16 — tests.html had tab navigation + tab content destroyed
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add tab-navigation + macro-signature checklist to S05 template prompt; analyzed in F-00080 self-assess (ai-dev/work/F-00080/reports/F-00080_self_assess_report.md). Target file: prompts/F-00080_S05_template_prompt.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S15 unit-tests gate required a fix cycle despite eventual pass — possible flakiness
findings.recommendation: Investigate whether the S15 exit=2 was test infrastructure flakiness or a genuine transient defect. If flakiness: add a retry-on-exit-2 rule to the QV gate executor. If genuine: document the failure mode so future prompts can preempt it.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Investigate S15 exit=2 flakiness in test-runner; analyzed in F-00080 self-assess (ai-dev/work/F-00080/reports/F-00080_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/test_runner.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: S16 integration-tests fix cycle — E2E seed insufficient for empty-state pages
findings.recommendation: Seed more rows into the E2E fixture so queue, history, batches, and docs_library pages are non-empty by default, OR ensure integration tests assert empty-state markup explicitly rather than relying on a populated DB.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00080/fix-cycles/F-00080_S16_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md:44-49 — 6 integration tests failed: test_queue_empty_state, test_history_empty_state, test_all_active_empty_state, test_docs_library_empty_state, test_e2e_seed_runs_against_fresh_db
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add seed data to E2E fixtures for empty-state pages; analyzed in F-00080 self-assess (ai-dev/work/F-00080/reports/F-00080_self_assess_report.md). Target: ai-dev/active/F-00080/e2e_fixtures/ or integration test fixtures. Effort: M.

findings.title: S18 browser verification rebuilt E2E stack 3 times at ~8 min each — pre-flight static check would catch issues in seconds
findings.recommendation: Add a pre-flight check to S18 that renders all in-scope pages and asserts `data-empty-state` and `data-tour-seen` attributes are present with non-empty slug values before launching the full browser session.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add static pre-flight check to S18 browser verification prompt; analyzed in F-00080 self-assess (ai-dev/work/F-00080/reports/F-00080_self_assess_report.md). Target: prompts/F-00080_S18_BrowserVerification_prompt.md. Effort: S.
